# Module 3 - Understanding Markets & Your Competitive Space v5.3

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Boots to Business Module 3 Understanding Markets & Your Competitive Space Version 5.3

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns accounting, branding, business planning during Ideation, Validation, Formation and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- Boots to Business Module 3
- Understanding Markets & Your Competitive Space
- Version 5.3
- Instructor Notes:
- Begin by recapping of what was talked about in the previous two modules.
- We have completed a basic introduction to entrepreneurship and talked about where to look for ideas and how you figure out if that idea can be turned into a business concept.
- Now, we need to figure out who you are going to sell that product or service to and begin to think about your potential competition.

## People and links

- Organizations: U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA), Small Business Development Center (SBDC), APEX Accelerator
